textByHashes.fe65238d26e6d9ad635817a92261f8d55c383cad: Oh no, not another human... what do you want then?
textByHashes.1de3e4cc8efc573f53a0c1e3034b401c02f2a504: Not that often, no, but sometimes.
textByHashes.c9db303c7cbd47ac4124042d65be8ca0c98cd2c3: Of course, since you people are too big for dwarven clothes, they typically don't stay very long.
textByHashes.0e4167f6707f6ede0502de963a403231bc2f1cc3: What'd be the point? Besides, I don't make these clothes myself.
textByHashes.676155c61c4cf7870f65d92bbb5654d9fd6d625e: Oh, my sister, she lives in Keldagrim-East. Has a little stall on the other side of the Kelda.
textByHashes.660d60c62839a9428ec1b5d7f240ba4ee41ef8e0: If she only worked a little harder, like me, she wouldn't have to live in the sewers of the city. Shame really.
textByHashes.7ae808405079e72e9a3b0d89df6e270e5161805e: Keldagrim-East, such a ghastly place. Not civil, polite and clean like we are in the West.
textByHashes.ff232ce0b8b78127b28a801920404891759d1a6c: Quests? Why would I have any quests?
textByHashes.c8d8f8cbe8ac77e1c85aedccac5500a63a513f18: No, not right now... maybe I'll have something for you to do later, but nothing at the moment.
textByHashes.3ad813c0238134cf11adbabbe37137873a6807d3: I ehm... find myself in some slight trouble, human. I was wondering if you were busy?
textByHashes.4424cb7f56ca31dce5e4af7e304bea3cfd238b97: I need some clothing equipment for my sister. But hurry up! I will need 2 needles before 10 minutes are up.
textByHashes.9804e8d666785dcc8d20c86e99c982a333004596: I need some clothing equipment for my sister. But hurry up! I will need 3 needles before 10 minutes are up.

textByHashes.746e8118bd9326dc7f562d2202a31e2a43c7c38f: I need some clothing equipment for my sister. But hurry up! I will need 4 balls of wool before 20 minutes are up.
textByHashes.ff69bf10db0c84a01a12c802417e1a8eb084e760: I'm in need of some raw supplies. Get me pieces of item and be quick about it! I need them within the next minutes!
textByHashes.bb67360bc3de970348176261e8a8614929354b89: I'm in need of some raw supplies. Get me bars of item and be quick about it! I need them within the next minutes!
textByHashes.9d9aa37ecea267f63da302a4e02d64dc3f45c7f7: I'm still waiting for item! Are you getting them or are you still looking for the way out of the palace?
textByHashes.c1a497c2daa3259c65e530545e110a89d6cb8cd1: That just goes to show you can't trust humans!
textByHashes.d6738d0294d84f86042ab8dbf2828cf78d0550ec: Hurry up then, I haven't got all day you know!
textByHashes.2fe7df1c4a8272cb8a80977cd4d6f26fc188e02e: Oh, I should have known not to assign a human anything more complex than tying together his shoelaces. You didn't get me my item, did you? The minutes have run out.
textByHashes.931ed48b8d69dbe3092cb1d0e297ab4f82564abb: Oh, I should have known not to assign a human anything more complex than tying together her shoelaces. You didn't get me my item, did you? The minutes have run out.
textByHashes.9b1018c84c167a7d054f50634cafc7cea8be9efb: Oh, I should have known not to assign a human anything more complex than tying together their shoelaces. You didn't get me my item, did you? The minutes have run out.
textByHashes.c8718025363a953f6e56cd6be546fb1c139ed277: Can't you humans tell the time! You're too late!
textByHashes.e5f891aa35abbf9acccd453a1c271892478ffe32: I'm amazed at your level of competence!
textByHashes.98cf91cb131c9c6ec4fe43c7fc6d312a50d1cdbf: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to tell you about some crafting secrets?
textByHashes.6b91ead5f0f435645744e7da7c38465954c6bd4c: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you prefer me to teach you a bit about how you can mine more efficiently?
textByHashes.f91c9fdf173e3389a2616ff163cd9707ec5cfa82: Do you want me to pay you in gold or would you like me to show you some smithing tricks?
